title: Megalastrum pulverulentum
taxonomy: Megalastrum pulverulentum is a species of fern in the family Lomariopsidaceae. It belongs to the genus Megalastrum, which is a group of ferns. The Lomariopsidaceae family is a group of ferns that are commonly known as the cheesefoot ferns or the lomariopsid ferns. Megalastrum pulverulentum is a member of the class Polypodiopsida, which is a group of vascular plants that includes all ferns. This species is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America.
